title: Alternate Live Action Sequence
wikitext:
[]: Alternate Live Action Sequence             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Apr 26, 2011 10:42 am I'm working on revising and optimizing various pages on my site, and I just went over the page for the Alternate Live Action Sequence. http://www.evamonkey.com/alternate-live-action-sequence/ I'm trying to be more accurate with naming things, and I'm looking for a literal title for this extra. I understand that "Alternate Live Action Sequence" is fairly close, but I wanted to be more descriptive. I'm aware that this video was included on the Renewal extras disc. Can anyone tell me what the video was labeled as on the DVD, what the Japanese is (romaji is cool) and what that literally translates to? Thanks in advance.

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Tue Apr 26, 2011 11:09 am From my research on old 2chan threads, I found the following: Part of the extra disc in DVD-BOX「NEON GENESIS EVANGELION DVD-BOX」(KIBA-91001) [also known as "Renewal Box" in Japan] released on Jun 25 2003 It was named as 劇場版#26実写パート 特別ラッシュ編集版 Gekijouban #26 Jissha Part - tokubetsu rush henshuuban Movie version #26 real life action part - special rush edited version

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Apr 26, 2011 11:42 am symbv wrote: It was named as 劇場版#26実写パート 特別ラッシュ編集版 Gekijouban #26 Jissha Part - tokubetsu rush henshuuban Movie version #26 real life action part - special rush edited version

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Tue Apr 26, 2011 11:44 am You got what you wished for -- a literal title

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Apr 26, 2011 11:49 am symbv wrote: You got what you wished for -- a literal title

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Tue Apr 26, 2011 4:00 pm I can see why they cut that out. A shame though, it would have been awesome in a creepy sense. Poor Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by Atropos » Fri Oct 03, 2014 4:54 pm Anyone know who provides the voice of Shinji in this cut?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Oct 03, 2014 5:24 pm I think it's Anno.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Fri Oct 03, 2014 7:19 pm Would he have been credited for it anywhere?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Oct 03, 2014 8:33 pm Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: Would he have been credited for it anywhere?

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Fri Oct 03, 2014 9:30 pm I'm also pretty positive it's Anno. It sounds exactly like him and who else would possibly voice Adult Shinji? And could you think of a more fitting director cameo?

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sat Oct 04, 2014 12:06 am It would be doing Shinji justice-- after all, isn't he a portion of Anno's psyche?

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Sat Oct 04, 2014 12:13 am Anno in Schizo/Parano (1997) wrote: The characters of 'Eva' are all composite personalities based around my own personality. Shinji-kun is the current me
